today_expressions.english: Can I have a pair of slippers?
Can I get a toothbrush set?
May I have two more bath towels?
Can I get some extra bottled water?
today_expressions.chinese: 能多给我几瓶矿泉水吗？

today_expressions.english: Do you have a travel adapter I can borrow?
today_expressions.chinese: 你们有可以借的旅行转换插头吗？

quick_review: 先收藏，下一集继续同一场景。
